ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictors" (
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictor */,
  "predictor_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictor (e.g., Avg. monthly change in no. movies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictor */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Size of the predictor's effect on customer behavior */,
  "effect_sign" TEXT /* Sign of the predictor's effect (positive or negative) */,
  "actionable" INTEGER /* Whether the predictor is actionable by the service */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the predictor (e.g., content, shipping, price) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the predictor (e.g., movie selection, shipping speed, pricing plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer exhibiting the behavior */,
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictor influencing the behavior */,
  "behavior_value" REAL /* Value of the behavior (e.g., average monthly change in no. movies) */,
  "behavior_date" TEXT /* Date the behavior was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_behavior_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_behavior_predictor_id FOREIGN KEY ("predictor_id") REFERENCES predictors ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the customer signed up for the service */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "incentive_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive */,
  "offer_value" REAL /* Value of the incentive (e.g., discount amount) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the incentive expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_lifecycle" (
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "lifecycle_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the customer lifecycle (e.g., onboarding, active, dormant) */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the customer entered the current lifecycle stage */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the customer exited the current lifecycle stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_lifecycle_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incentive */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifecycle stage when the incentive was offered */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the incentive was offered */,
  "redeemed_date" TEXT /* Date the incentive was redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id", "customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_incentives_lifecycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifecycle_id") REFERENCES customer_lifecycle ("lifecycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavior_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the behavior model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the behavior model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc_score" REAL /* AUC score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES behavior_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, customer support, marketing specialist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., data science, customer success, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access permission */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
